what_it_is: A governed prompt-authoring + delivery loop that replaces the founder as prompt writer/router/critic/dispatcher. It reads system evidence deterministically, classifies a problem into one of 9 classes, runs a 12-stage pipeline (Evidence Reader → ... → Main Brain Decision → Prompt Compiler → Dispatch Router → Receipt Verifier → Harvest), and compiles delivery-aware "prompt packets" that carry execution_mode/route/executor/authority. Contract v1.1 adds a delivery rail (P0-PDR) plus RUNTIME_CONTINUITY_LAW_v1 (degrade, never freeze the lane) and non-binary result states. Workers receive ONLY the packet — never P0 doctrine (leak = lint rejection).

current_state.note: Docs say 'current rung R1' but the filesystem is further along: Phase-0 scripts are real and tested (10/10 tests), lane p0pgr IS registered in data/github_automation_registry_v1.json, Phase-1 shadow is DONE (10 packets in outbox, campaign receipt, phase1 scorecard 10/10 compiled 0 leakage awaiting founder diff-accept), and Phase-2 CLOUD_ONLY ROI track is founder-UNLOCKED and has EXECUTED twice (M10 ranker + M03 live trustfield.ca audit, PARTIAL, 0 sends/deploys/merges). LOCKED/unbuilt: R2 cloud run is BUILT but never actually run (blocked on founder push+click, R2 proof = PARTIAL); R3 cron, R4 auto-dispatch, R5 ROI-autonomy all gated behind founder unlock receipts that do not exist; Mac runner (Phase 3) DEFERRED, fallback removed from packets; prompt registry SCHEMA exists but data/p0pgr_prompt_registry_v1.json is NOT built. Real dispatch, deploy, merge, cron, and auto-dispatch are all locked.

key_assets.purpose: Operating contract v1.1 (supersedes v1.0). RUNTIME_CONTINUITY_LAW_v1, 12-stage pipeline, execution modes CLOUD_ONLY/HYBRID_MAC/HUMAN_REVIEW/FOUNDER_ONLY, HARD_BLOCK whitelist.
Routing table (packet type -> destination -> mode), rail reliability ranking, Mac Runner safety rules 1-10, spend governor caps ($1.5k pre-revenue).
R1-R5 rung ladder from session-driven to full autonomy; each rung has entry gate + exit receipt + founder unlock. Names the exact locked seams.
Packet v1.1 (the dispatch unit). Enums for owner_agent/delivery_route/target_executor + conditional requires for HYBRID_MAC, cloud_safe=false, deploy->FOUNDER_ONLY.
One cycle's loop-state receipt (deterministic L13 replay via bundle_hash, non-binary quality_state, founder_blocked_snapshot).
Real (non-shadow) execution receipt: evidence_artifacts (proof not prose), founder_authorization_ref required, cost never bare $0 without accounting_note.
Reusable prompt-template catalog (M07 packet-factory memory). status AUTO_DISPATCH_APPROVED is per-template founder gate = unit of autonomy. DATA FILE NOT YET BUILT.
Phase-0 shadow cycle: evidence -> load packet -> lint -> route-decision-only -> loop-state receipt; lint fail files a repair_candidate, never lane STOP. No LLM, true $0.
Packet linter: JSON-schema + 7 semantic checks incl P0-CORE leak fingerprints, HYBRID_MAC/cloud_safe/deploy gates, HARD_BLOCK reason whitelist. Verdict PASS|REPAIR_CANDIDATE, exit 0 either way.
Deterministic evidence bundle w/ bundle_hash (L13). Reads contract files, registry, alive docs, newest receipts, census, outbox/repair queue. Derived from file bytes, never self-report.

Phase-1 strategic planner: generates 10 shadow packets across 6 board axes, runs CHESS pass, compiles+lints v1.1 packets, emits campaign receipt + phase1 scorecard. moves()/compile_packet()/chess_pass() are the plug points.

Phase-2 deterministic ROI ranker (move M10). Weighted factor table (revenue35/trust25/workload15/cloud15/reversibility10) -> ranked cloud-only queue. Recommendation only; does NOT flip dispatch flags.

R2 cloud shadow cycle. workflow_dispatch ONLY (cron line commented, gated on R3 unlock), permissions contents:read, runs Phase-0 tests + evidence + cycle + independent receipt validation. LOCKED: never actually run in cloud yet.

10 tests guarding lint + cycle (valid packet PASS, missing fields/HYBRID_MAC/HARD_BLOCK/cloud_safe/deploy/P0-leak -> REPAIR_CANDIDATE, cycle receipt validity, repair-candidate-not-lane-stop). Gate for the CI workflow.
Live ranked ROI queue (M03:86 > M05:74 > M04:73.75 > ...), held items (M08 HOLD_CLOUD_UNSAFE), first_execution_candidate M03. Consumed by any dashboard/digest.

Founder authorization receipt that unlocked Phase-2 cloud-only execution. Scope limits: no Mac, one candidate at a time, no cron, deploy/merge/L5 stay FOUNDER_ONLY. Pattern for every future rung unlock.

extension_points: scripts/p0pgr_packet_lint_v1.py lint_packet(): 7 semantic checks append to a reasons list (continuity: never raise) — new checks slot in as additional appends, guarded by the existing PASS|REPAIR_CANDIDATE contract.

P0_PROMPT_REGISTRY_SCHEMA_v1.json exists but data/p0pgr_prompt_registry_v1.json is UNBUILT — the M07 'packet factory' registry file + template compiler (merge packet_defaults + {{parameter_slots}}) is the widest-open plug point.
scripts/p0pgr_evidence_reader_v1.py collect(): add new evidence sources to the bundle dict before bundle_hash is computed — they automatically flow into every cycle's L13 replay hash.
scripts/p0pgr_phase2_rank_v1.py FACTORS/WEIGHTS tables + campaign_planner moves() (line 130): new board moves / ROI factors are pure dict entries; ranking is deterministic authored constants.
receipts/p0pgr/repair_candidates/ is written by the cycle but nothing re-reads it — a repair re-linter is an obvious closed-loop slot.
Pipeline stage 11 'Receipt Verifier' is specified and P0_EXECUTION_RECEIPT_SCHEMA_v1.json exists, but there is NO scripts/p0pgr_receipt_verify_v1.py — the adversarial verifier is unbuilt.
Scorecards + queue JSON (phase1_scorecard, phase2_scorecard, phase2_queue) are stable machine-readable state that any read-only dashboard/digest consumes directly.
The workflow's cron line and R3/R4/R5 founder-unlock receipts are deliberate seams — but LOCKED (touching them is not sandbox-safe).

buildable_ideas.idea: Build the M07 prompt-registry data file (data/p0pgr_prompt_registry_v1.json) + a template compiler: extract the 10 shadow outbox packets into >=1 registered TPL-* template per recurring problem_class, each with packet_defaults + {{parameter_slots}} + >=2 evidence_basis receipts, ALL status DRAFT (never AUTO_DISPATCH_APPROVED, which is founder-gated). Turns founder prompt-writing into a reusable asset.

Build the missing Receipt Verifier as scripts/p0pgr_receipt_verify_v1.py: read-only adversarial checker that validates any execution receipt against P0_EXECUTION_RECEIPT_SCHEMA_v1.json + provenance rules (executed_at must not predate packet created_at, founder_authorization_ref present for real exec, evidence_artifacts present, cost not bare $0 without accounting_note) and emits a verdict receipt. Fills the specified-but-unbuilt pipeline stage 11.

Build a self-contained read-only HTML status dashboard (per founder 'presentation = simple HTML page' rule) that renders the R1-R5 rung ladder, phase gates, the ranked phase2 queue, executed moves (M10/M03), findings F1/F2, held items, founder_blocked snapshot, and cost=0. Kills the founder's manual status-reading. Build the file only — do NOT push to Cloudflare.

Build scripts/p0pgr_repair_relint_v1.py: read each file in receipts/p0pgr/repair_candidates/, re-run lint_packet on the referenced packet, and emit a resolved/persisting/new report receipt. Closes the 'rejection re-enters the loop as repair' loop that the cycle currently only half-implements (it files candidates but never re-processes them).

Build a batch outbox linter: the R2 workflow cycles only ONE packet at a time, but 10 packets sit in the outbox and the mac_runner fallback_route was bulk-removed (phase2_scorecard notes a re-lint). A script that lints every receipts/p0pgr/outbox/*.json and emits a batch report catches drift across the whole queue in one pass.

Build a deterministic weekly founder ROI digest generator (markdown/HTML) that the R5 rung explicitly calls for: summarize ranked moves, executed candidates (M10 ranker, M03 PARTIAL), findings needing founder eyes (F1 pricing ambiguity, F2 doc-stale v71->v108), held cloud-unsafe items, and running cost/send/deploy counters — all already present in the queue + scorecard + exec receipt.
